_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your details. Used on Termux where PyYAML is unavailable.
_comment_ytdl: yt-dlp / @distube/ytdl-core backup. Used when Lavalink fails. Termux: pkg install python ffmpeg && pip install yt-dlp
_comment_sniper: Set sniper to false to disable it. Replace with a config object to enable (see config.example.yaml for all options).
